Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff America California Bnak's Motion to compel response to discovery granted:
1. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Defendants shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's first set of form interrogatories, special interrogatories, requests for production, and request for admissions on or before December 23, 2009;
3. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
